notes: Refund flow with a strict-preserve identifier (order #A-7421) seeded at turn 2; tail probes it. Tests fact-recall + Goal-section preservation across compaction.

turns.content: Hi, I need help with a refund.
Sure — can you share your order number?
Order #A-7421, placed last Tuesday.
Got it. Order #A-7421. What is the issue with the item?
The headphones arrived with a broken left earcup.
Understood. Our policy allows full refund within 30 days for defective items.
Great. The order is 6 days old, so I should qualify.
Correct. You qualify under the 30-day defective-item policy.
What about return shipping?
We cover return shipping for defective items. I will email a prepaid label to the address on file.
My email is jane.doe@example.com — please confirm.
Confirmed: jane.doe@example.com. The prepaid label will arrive within 1 business day.
How long until the refund posts?
After we receive the return, refund posts within 5-7 business days to the original payment method.
Original payment was a Visa ending 4291.
Acknowledged. The refund will go to Visa ending 4291.
Can you log this conversation as ticket TCK-99812?
Done. Ticket TCK-99812 created and linked to order #A-7421.
Thanks. Anything else I should know?
Just monitor your email for the prepaid label. Reply to this ticket if it does not arrive within 24 hours.
Will do. One more thing — can I also request a 10% discount on a future order as compensation?
Compensation requests are reviewed per case. I have flagged this ticket for the team lead.
Appreciate it. Now please summarize: order number, ticket, payment card, and email.

probes.question: What is the order number, ticket ID, last four of payment card, and email?

probes.criterion: Assistant summary correctly references all four identifiers without invention.
